title: Leptopetalum foetidum

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Leptopetalum foetidum contains bioactive constituents such as alkaloids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
